puzzles.label: Rook Skewer
puzzles.hint: Rook to e8 — king flees, then we take the queen.

puzzles.label: Bishop skewer
puzzles.hint: Bishop to e4 pins the king and rook.

puzzles.label: Bishop pins the queen
puzzles.hint: Bishop to f5 pins the queen to the king

puzzles.label: Queen Skewer K+R
puzzles.hint: Bishop skewers the king and wins the rook.

puzzles.label: Bishop + rook Skewer
puzzles.hint: Bishop to h6+ wins the queen.

puzzles.label: Absolute Pin
puzzles.hint: Bishop to c5 pins the knight to the king.

puzzles.label: Queen Pin
puzzles.hint: Rook to c8 pins the queen to the king.

puzzles.label: Relative Pin
puzzles.hint: Bishop to c4 pins the knight to the queen.

puzzles.label: Diagonal Pin
puzzles.hint: Pin and draw ewith the lightsquared bishop
